code: import React,{useEffect,useState}from'react';import axios from'axios';import'./LeaderboardTable.css';import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";const LeaderboardTable=()=>{const[leaderboard,setLeaderboard]=useState([]);const[loading,setLoading]=useState(true);useEffect(()=>{const fetchLeaderboard=async()=>{try{const res=await axios.get('http://localhost:3001/scores');setLeaderboard(res.data);}catch(err){console.error('Lỗi khi lấy bảng xếp hạng:',err);}finally{setLoading(false);}};fetchLeaderboard();},[]);const getRankDisplay=index=>{const trophies=["🏆","🥈","🥉"];return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"rank-cell",children:index<3?trophies[index]:index+1});};if(loading)return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("p",{className:"loading",children:"\u23F3 \u0110ang t\u1EA3i b\u1EA3ng x\u1EBFp h\u1EA1ng..."});return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"leaderboard-container",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h2",{className:"leaderboard-title",children:"\uD83C\uDFC6 B\u1EA3ng x\u1EBFp h\u1EA1ng"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("table",{className:"leaderboard-table",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("thead",{children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("tr",{children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("th",{children:"#"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("th",{children:"Ng\u01B0\u1EDDi ch\u01A1i"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("th",{children:"\u0110i\u1EC3m"})]})}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("tbody",{children:leaderboard.map((user,index)=>/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("tr",{children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("td",{className:"rank",children:getRankDisplay(index)}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("td",{className:"player",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("img",{src:user.avatar,alt:"avatar"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("span",{children:user.name})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("td",{className:"score",children:user.score})]},user.telegram_id))})]})]});};export default LeaderboardTable;
